executives.name: Helmut Finger
executives.background: Mr. Finger is a businessman with extensive experience in international trade and finance, particularly in the European markets.

executives.name: Ken Konkin
executives.background: Mr. Konkin is a Professional Geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and mining. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Valley of the Kings deposit at Pretium Resources Inc. and has worked extensively in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia.

executives.name: Scott Davis
executives.background: Mr. Davis is a partner of Cross Davis & Company LLP, a firm focused on providing accounting and management services to publicly listed companies. He has over 20 years of experience in the financial sector.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald-Peter Stöferle
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Stöferle is a Managing Partner and Fund Manager at Incrementum AG. He is well-known for his 'In Gold We Trust' report and has deep expertise in precious metals markets.
